revision.text:
{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||$B={{Main other|{{Short description|Soft redirect to Wiktionary|noreplace}}|}} {{ombox | style = border-left: 10px solid var(--color-progressive, #36c) | image = none | imageright = [[File:Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg|50px|link=|alt=]] | text = Wikipedia does not have an article on "{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{lcfirst:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{PAGENAME}}}}{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}", but its sister project [[Wiktionary]] does: {{Clickable button|Read the Wiktionary {{#if:{{{many|}}}|entries|entry}} "{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}{{{1|{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}"||url={{fullurl:wiktionary:{{{1|Special:Search/{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}}|class=mw-ui-progressive|style=text-align: left;}} You can also: * [{{fullurl:Special:Search|search={{PAGENAMEE}}&fulltext=Search}} Search for ''{{PAGENAME}}'' in Wikipedia] to check for alternative titles or spellings.
* [[Special:EditPage/{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Start the ''{{PAGENAME}}'' article]], using the [[Wikipedia:Article wizard|Article Wizard]] if you wish, or [[Wikipedia:Requested articles|add a request for it]]; but please remember that Wikipedia is [[WP:WINAD|not a dictionary]].
[[wiktionary:{{{1|Special:Search/{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}]] }}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{Soft redirect protection}}{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||[[Category:Redirects to Wiktionary]]}}}}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing misc last stuff
revision.text:
{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||$B={{Main other|{{Short description|Soft redirect to Wiktionary|noreplace}}|}} {{ombox | style = border-left: 10px solid var(--color-progressive, #36c) | image = none | imageright = [[File:Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg|50px|link=|alt=]] | text = Wikipedia does not have an article on "{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{lcfirst:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{PAGENAME}}}}{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}", but its sister project [[Wiktionary]] does: {{Clickable button|Read the Wiktionary {{#if:{{{many|}}}|entries|entry}} "{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}{{{1|{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}"||url={{fullurl:wiktionary:{{{1|Special:Search/{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}}|class=mw-ui-progressive|style=text-align: left;}} You can also: * [{{fullurl:Special:Search|search={{PAGENAMEE}}&fulltext=Search}} Search for ''{{PAGENAME}}'' in Wikipedia] to check for alternative titles or spellings.
* [[Special:EditPage/{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Start the ''{{PAGENAME}}'' article]], using the [[Wikipedia:Article wizard|Article Wizard]] if you wish, or [[Wikipedia:Requested articles|add a request for it]]; but please remember that Wikipedia is [[WP:WINAD|not a dictionary]].
[[wiktionary:{{{1|Special:Search/{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}]] }}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{Soft redirect protection}}{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||[[Category:Redirects to Wiktionary]]}}}}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||$B={{Main other|{{Short description|Soft redirect to Wiktionary|noreplace}}|}} {{ombox | style = border-left: 10px solid var(--color-progressive, #36c) | image = none | imageright = [[File:Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg|50px|link=|alt=]] | text = Wikipedia does not have an article on "{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{lcfirst:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{PAGENAME}}}}{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}", but its sister project [[Wiktionary]] does: {{Clickable button|Read the Wiktionary {{#if:{{{many|}}}|entries|entry}} "{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}{{{1|{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}"||url={{fullurl:wiktionary:{{{1|Special:Search/{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}}|class=mw-ui-progressive|style=text-align: left;}} You can also: * [{{fullurl:Special:Search|search={{PAGENAMEE}}&fulltext=Search}} Search for ''{{PAGENAME}}'' in Wikipedia] to check for alternative titles or spellings.
* [[Special:EditPage/{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Start the ''{{PAGENAME}}'' article]], using the [[Wikipedia:Article wizard|Article Wizard]] if you wish, or [[Wikipedia:Requested articles|add a request for it]]; but please remember that Wikipedia is [[WP:WINAD|not a dictionary]].

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||$B={{Main other|{{Short description|Soft redirect to Wiktionary|noreplace}}|}} {{ombox | style = border-left: 10px solid var(--color-progressive, #36c) | image = none | imageright = [[File:Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg|50px|link=|alt=]] | text = Wikipedia does not have an article on "{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{lcfirst:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{PAGENAME}}}}{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}", but its sister project [[Wiktionary]] does: {{Clickable button|Read the Wiktionary {{#if:{{{many|}}}|entries|entry}} "{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}{{{1|{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}"||url={{fullurl:wiktionary:{{{1|Special:Search/{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}}|class=mw-ui-progressive|style=text-align: left;}} You can also: * [{{fullurl:Special:Search|search={{PAGENAMEE}}&fulltext=Search}} Search for ''{{PAGENAME}}'' in Wikipedia] to check for alternative titles or spellings.
* [[Special:EditPage/{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Start the ''{{PAGENAME}}'' article]], using the [[Wikipedia:Article wizard|Article Wizard]] if you wish, or [[Wikipedia:Requested articles|add a request for it]]; but please remember that Wikipedia is [[WP:WINAD|not a dictionary]].
[[wiktionary:{{{1|Special:Search/{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}]] }}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{Soft redirect protection}}{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||[[Category:Redirects to Wiktionary]] }}}}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||$B={{Main other|{{Short description|Soft redirect to Wiktionary|noreplace}}|}} {{ombox | style = border-left: 10px solid var(--color-progressive, #36c) | image = none | imageright = [[File:Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg|50px|link=|alt=]] | text = Wikipedia does not have an article on "{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{lcfirst:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{PAGENAME}}}}{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}", but its sister project [[:en:Wiktionary|Wiktionary]] does: {{Clickable button|Read the Wiktionary {{#if:{{{many|}}}|entries|entry}} "{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}{{{1|{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}"||url={{fullurl:wiktionary:{{{1|Special:Search/{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}}|class=mw-ui-progressive|style=text-align: left;}} You can also: * [{{fullurl:Special:Search|search={{PAGENAMEE}}&fulltext=Search}} Search for ''{{PAGENAME}}'' in Wikipedia] to check for alternative titles or spellings.
* [[Special:EditPage/{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Start the ''{{PAGENAME}}'' article]], using the [[Wikipedia:Article wizard|Article Wizard]] if you wish, or [[Wikipedia:Requested articles|add a request for it]]; but please remember that Wikipedia is [[WP:WINAD|not a dictionary]].
[[wiktionary:{{{1|Special:Search/{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}]] }}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{Soft redirect protection}}{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||[[Category:Redirects to Wiktionary]] [[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]]}}}}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||$B={{Main other|{{Short description|Soft redirect to Wiktionary|noreplace}}|}} {{ombox | style = border-left: 10px solid var(--color-progressive, #36c) | image = none | imageright = [[File:Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg|50px|link=|alt=]] | text = Wikipedia does not have an article on "{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{lcfirst:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{PAGENAME}}}}{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}", but its sister project [[:en:Wiktionary|Wiktionary]] does: {{Clickable button|Read the Wiktionary {{#if:{{{many|}}}|entries|entry}} "{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}{{{1|{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}"||url={{fullurl:wiktionary:{{{1|Special:Search/{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}}|class=mw-ui-progressive|style=text-align: left;}} You can also: * [{{fullurl:Special:Search|search={{PAGENAMEE}}&fulltext=Search}} Search for ''{{PAGENAME}}'' in Wikipedia] to check for alternative titles or spellings.
* [[Special:EditPage/{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Start the ''{{PAGENAME}}'' article]], using the [[Wikipedia:Article wizard|Article Wizard]] if you wish, or [[Wikipedia:Requested articles|add a request for it]]; but please remember that Wikipedia is [[WP:WINAD|not a dictionary]].
[[wiktionary:{{{1|Special:Search/{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}]] }}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{Soft redirect protection}}{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||[[Category:Redirects to Wiktionary]] [[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]]}}}}}} {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||$B={{Main other|{{Short description|Soft redirect to Wiktionary|noreplace}}|}} {{ombox | style = border-left: 10px solid var(--color-progressive, #36c) | image = none | imageright = [[File:Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg|50px|link=|alt=]] | text = Wikipedia does not have an article on "{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{lcfirst:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{PAGENAME}}}}{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}", but its sister project [[:en:Wiktionary|Wiktionary]] does: {{Clickable button|Read the Wiktionary {{#if:{{{many|}}}|entries|entry}} "{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}{{{1|{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}"||url={{fullurl:wiktionary:{{{1|Special:Search/{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}}|class=mw-ui-progressive|style=text-align: left;}} You can also: * [{{fullurl:Special:Search|search={{PAGENAMEE}}&fulltext=Search}} Search for ''{{PAGENAME}}'' in Wikipedia] to check for alternative titles or spellings.
* [[Special:EditPage/{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Start the ''{{PAGENAME}}'' article]], using the [[Wikipedia:Article wizard|Article Wizard]] if you wish, or [[Wikipedia:Requested articles|add a request for it]]; but please remember that Wikipedia is [[WP:WINAD|not a dictionary]].
[[wiktionary:{{{1|Special:Search/{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}]] }}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{Soft redirect protection}}{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||[[Category:Redirects to Wiktionary]] [[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]]}}}}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||$B={{Main other|{{Short description|Soft redirect to Wiktionary|noreplace}}|}} {{ombox | style = border-left: 10px solid var(--color-progressive, #36c) | image = none | imageright = [[File:Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg|50px|link=|alt=]] | text = Wikipedia does not have an article on "{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{lcfirst:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{PAGENAME}}}}{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}", but its sister project [[:en:Wiktionary|Wiktionary]] does: {{Clickable button|Read the Wiktionary {{#if:{{{many|}}}|entries|entry}} "{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}{{{1|{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}"||url={{fullurl:wiktionary:{{{1|Special:Search/{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}}|class=mw-ui-progressive|style=text-align: left;}} You can also: * [{{fullurl:Special:Search|search={{PAGENAMEE}}&fulltext=Search}} Search for ''{{PAGENAME}}'' in Wikipedia] to check for alternative titles or spellings.
* [[Special:EditPage/{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Start the ''{{PAGENAME}}'' article]], using the [[Wikipedia:Article wizard|Article Wizard]] if you wish, or [[Wikipedia:Requested articles|add a request for it]]; but please remember that Wikipedia is [[WP:WINAD|not a dictionary]].
[[wiktionary:{{{1|Special:Search/{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}]] }}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{Soft redirect protection}}{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||[[Category:Redirects to Wiktionary]] [[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]]}}}}}} {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]]

{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||$B={{Main other|{{Short description|Soft redirect to Wiktionary|noreplace}}|}} {{ombox | style = border-left: 10px solid var(--color-progressive, #36c) | image = none | imageright = [[File:Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg|50px|link=|alt=]] | text = Wikipedia does not have an article on "{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{lcfirst:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{PAGENAME}}}}{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}", but its sister project [[:en:Wiktionary|Wiktionary]] does: {{Clickable button|Read the Wiktionary {{#if:{{{many|}}}|entries|entry}} "{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}{{{1|{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}"||url={{fullurl:wiktionary:{{{1|Special:Search/{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}}|class=mw-ui-progressive|style=text-align: left;}} You can also: * [{{fullurl:Special:Search|search={{PAGENAMEE}}&fulltext=Search}} Search for ''{{PAGENAME}}'' in Wikipedia] to check for alternative titles or spellings.
* [[Special:EditPage/{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Start the ''{{PAGENAME}}'' article]], using the [[Wikipedia:Article wizard|Article Wizard]] if you wish, or [[Wikipedia:Requested articles|add a request for it]]; but please remember that Wikipedia is [[WP:WINAD|not a dictionary]].
[[wiktionary:{{{1|Special:Search/{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}]] }}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{Soft redirect protection}}{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||[[Category:Redirects to Wiktionary]] [[Category:sn_crud|TEST{{subst:PAGENAME}}]]}}}}}} {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23694499169|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||$B={{Main other|{{Short description|Soft redirect to Wiktionary|noreplace}}|}} {{ombox | style = border-left: 10px solid var(--color-progressive, #36c) | image = none | imageright = [[File:Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg|50px|link=|alt=]] | text = Wikipedia does not have an article on "{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{lcfirst:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{PAGENAME}}}}{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}", but its sister project [[:en:Wiktionary|Wiktionary]] does: {{Clickable button|Read the Wiktionary {{#if:{{{many|}}}|entries|entry}} "{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}{{{1|{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}"||url={{fullurl:wiktionary:{{{1|Special:Search/{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}}|class=mw-ui-progressive|style=text-align: left;}} You can also: * [{{fullurl:Special:Search|search={{PAGENAMEE}}&fulltext=Search}} Search for ''{{PAGENAME}}'' in Wikipedia] to check for alternative titles or spellings.
* [[Special:EditPage/{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Start the ''{{PAGENAME}}'' article]], using the [[Wikipedia:Article wizard|Article Wizard]] if you wish, or [[Wikipedia:Requested articles|add a request for it]]; but please remember that Wikipedia is [[WP:WINAD|not a dictionary]].
[[wiktionary:{{{1|Special:Search/{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}]] }}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{Soft redirect protection}}{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||}}}}}} {{documentation}} [[Category:Redirects to Wiktionary]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTWiktionary redirect]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||$B={{Main other|{{Short description|Soft redirect to Wiktionary|noreplace}}|}} {{ombox | style = border-left: 10px solid var(--color-progressive, #36c) | image = none | imageright = [[File:Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg|50px|link=|alt=]] | text = Wikipedia does not have an article on "{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{lcfirst:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{PAGENAME}}}}{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}", but its sister project [[:en:Wiktionary|Wiktionary]] does: {{Clickable button|Read the Wiktionary {{#if:{{{many|}}}|entries|entry}} "{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}{{{1|{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}"||url={{fullurl:wiktionary:{{{1|Special:Search/{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}}|class=mw-ui-progressive|style=text-align: left;}} You can also: * [{{fullurl:Special:Search|search={{PAGENAMEE}}&fulltext=Search}} Search for ''{{PAGENAME}}'' in Wikipedia] to check for alternative titles or spellings.
* [[Special:EditPage/{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Start the ''{{PAGENAME}}'' article]], using the [[Wikipedia:Article wizard|Article Wizard]] if you wish, or [[Wikipedia:Requested articles|add a request for it]]; but please remember that Wikipedia is [[WP:WINAD|not a dictionary]].
[[wiktionary:{{{1|Special:Search/{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}]] }}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{Soft redirect protection}}{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||}}}}}} {{documentation}} [[Category:Redirects to Wiktionary]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTWiktionary redirect]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24314731306|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||$B={{Main other|{{Short description|Soft redirect to Wiktionary|noreplace}}|}} {{ombox | style = border-left: 10px solid var(--color-progressive, #36c) | image = none | imageright = [[File:Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg|50px|link=|alt=]] | text = Wikipedia does not have an article on "{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{lcfirst:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{PAGENAME}}}}{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}", but its sister project [[:en:Wiktionary|Wiktionary]] does: {{Clickable button|Read the Wiktionary {{#if:{{{many|}}}|entries|entry}} "{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}{{{1|{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{italic|}}}|''}}"||url={{fullurl:wiktionary:{{{1|Special:Search/{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}}|class=mw-ui-progressive|style=text-align: left;}} You can also: * [{{fullurl:Special:Search|search={{PAGENAMEE}}&fulltext=Search}} Search for ''{{PAGENAME}}'' in Wikipedia] to check for alternative titles or spellings.
* [[Special:EditPage/{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Start the ''{{PAGENAME}}'' article]], using the [[Wikipedia:Article wizard|Article Wizard]] if you wish, or [[Wikipedia:Requested articles|add a request for it]]; but please remember that Wikipedia is [[WP:WINAD|not a dictionary]].
[[wiktionary:{{{1|Special:Search/{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}]] }}{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{Soft redirect protection}}{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||}}}}}} {{documentation}} [[Category:Redirects to Wiktionary]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25015587690|time triggered pipeline]]
